# Evidence — #10204 (web/desktop/iOS/Android walkthrough generation)

#10204 and #10198 are the same deliverable: the full-journey walkthrough
generator. All evidence — green mock-lane run (desktop + mobile), human-speed
recordings, per-step vision verdicts, iOS-sim capture, the device matrix, and the
live-lane status — is in [`10198-full-walkthrough.md`](./10198-full-walkthrough.md)
and the artifacts alongside it (`10198-full-walkthrough-*`).
